emails.subject: Japanese Translation
emails.body: Japanese Translation Vince Joe Hirl mentioned this morning that "the risk book" that Enron wrote will be published in Japanese in the near future. Can you tell me who would kinow the publication details so that we can try to use it in suport of our publicity efforts for Enron in Japan? Thanks, Mike 81.3.5219.4584

emails.subject: RE: Japanese Translation
emails.body: RE: Japanese Translation Mike, I sent an inquiry to RISK. The problem is that they lost 16 people in the terrorist attack on WTC and the names haven't been released. The chances are I sent a message to a person who is swamped with work or will not respond at all. We have to wait a few days. Vince To: Kaminski, Vince J

emails.subject: RE: Japanese Translation
emails.body: Vince, Thanks for keeping up with this one. Mike
